title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic's Jared Sires built CLAFTS, an AI email assistant that uses Claude API and Claude Code to draft customer replies in a sales rep's voice. The tool reduces administrative burden for GTM teams by automating email composition.
